g.text: Token Bucket: Idle Fills, Burst Drains, Refill Drips
Bucket of 50 tokens, refilling at 10/sec. After 5 sec of idle the bucket is full; the next request can be a 50-burst, after which the client must wait for the drip refill.
(1) idle — refill drips, bucket fills to cap
(3) drip refill back to cap, 5 sec to recover
